response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his resume lacks clear evidence of recent work in renewable energy or construction tech, shows no AWS/Kubernetes project depth despite listing them, and his German language skill is only basic — a concern for a role requiring high on-site presence in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven track record in scalable systems, DevOps, and open-source architecture
Demonstrated learning agility and teaching ability through workshops and tooling contributions
concerns: No explicit experience with renewable energy, construction tech, or CRM/document automation systems
Limited evidence of hands-on AWS, Kubernetes, or Terraform usage despite listed skills
Basic German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
